summary: Seams are well-constructed and require no edits. Entry seam from Ch6 is bridged by shared kitchen space and Mira's expression echoing her defeated state at Ch6's close. Opening construction is structurally distinct from Ch8's opening (external event arrival vs. domestic routine). Character voice and register are consistent with style bible.
